title: Enderite_stuff
description: This mod adds enderite to minecraft. It is like netherite but better
body:
This mod adds a new ore to end. It is called enderite and it is better than netherite. It is as rare as netherite and you can upgrade diamond tools and armor to enderite with enderite ingots and netherite upgrade templates that can be found in bastion remnants. you can find enderite ore from end and then you have to smelt them to make enderite ingots
this is absolutely trash play fallen world instead it's better https://modrinth.com/modpack/fallen-world
